title: rubus × pseudoalterniflorus
intro: Rubus × pseudoalterniflorus, also known as the pseudoalterniflorus hybrid raspberry, is a type of flowering raspberry that is a natural hybrid between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its high content of anthocyanins and other flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoalterniflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves or berries in hot water or extracting the anthocyanins using a solvent, and have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health conditions.
